hero.description: Sonoro Digital designs and builds high-performance cloud platforms, AI orchestration systems, and resilient architectures for ambitious product teams.

whyUs.description: Our engineering philosophy combines deep architectural thinking with pragmatic execution. Here's what sets us apart.

architecture.title: Architecture-First Design
architecture.desc: We design systems from the data model up. Every SaaS product we build starts with a clean, event-driven architecture that scales from zero to millions of users without rewrites.

performance.title: Performance Obsession
performance.desc: Sub-100ms API responses. Lighthouse scores above 95. Core Web Vitals that convert. We treat performance as a feature, not an afterthought.

resilience.title: Resilience by Default
resilience.desc: Circuit breakers, graceful degradation, and multi-region failover built into every layer. Your platform stays online when it matters most.

ai.title: AI-Native Engineering
ai.desc: We orchestrate LLMs, vector databases, and agent workflows into production-grade features. Not demos — deployed systems generating real value.

caseStudies.description: Real architectures, real impact. Here are a few complex systems we've designed and delivered.

items.title: Multi-Tenant SaaS Platform
items.problem: A growing startup needed to migrate from a single-tenant monolith to a multi-tenant architecture capable of serving 10,000+ organizations.
items.solution: Designed an event-driven, database-per-tenant architecture with shared schema primitives and automated tenant provisioning.
items.result: Zero-downtime migration. 40x improvement in query performance. Ready for 100K+ tenants.

items.title: Real-Time Analytics Pipeline
items.problem: A fintech firm had 15-minute stale dashboards. Their batch ETL couldn't keep up with streaming transaction data.
items.solution: Built a streaming pipeline with Redis Streams, ClickHouse for OLAP, and websocket-driven live dashboards.
items.result: Sub-second dashboard refresh. 200x faster than batch processing. 99.9% data freshness SLA.

items.title: AI Orchestration Layer
items.problem: A product team wanted to embed AI agents into their workflow tool but had no infrastructure for LLM routing, retries, or observability.
items.solution: Built an AI gateway with model fallback, prompt versioning, cost tracking, and a vector-store-backed knowledge base.
items.result: 15ms p99 latency. 99.7% uptime. 3 AI agents deployed to production in 6 weeks.

footer.description: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. We'll discuss your architecture, identify bottlenecks, and outline a roadmap.
footer.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, stack, and goals...
